title: Canadian citizenship for stateless people - Canada.ca
content:
## Apply for Canadian citizenship: Stateless people
This citizenship application is only for stateless people born to a Canadian parent.
A person is stateless if no country or state recognizes them as a citizen or national under its laws.
Error loading the number of days. Try again.
$123 increased March 31, 2026
Processing times will vary based on
- the type of application submitted
- if the application is complete
- how quickly we expect to process applications we’ve already received
- how easily we can verify your information
- how long you take to respond to any requests or concerns
Learn how processing times are calculated .
